meta.title: Marketplace development cost with clear scope
meta.description: Get a clear, scoped estimate for a multi-vendor marketplace: Stripe Connect split payments, search and ranking, reviews, chat, vendor dashboard, anti-fraud, and…

hero.h1: marketplace development cost for your multi-vendor marketplace
hero.subtitle: Clear scope, Stripe Connect split payments, and catalog SEO built to convert from day one.

pain.title: When the numbers never settle
bullets: Have you ever tried to price a marketplace and the scope grows every meeting?
Have you ever started Stripe Connect and got stuck on onboarding, KYC, payouts, and compliance details?
Have you ever launched a catalog and no one finds it because search, ranking, and SEO do not line up?

benefits.title: Predictable scope
benefits.desc: You get a build plan with defined modules, acceptance criteria, and what is included, so your estimate stays stable.

benefits.title: Real multi-vendor ops
benefits.desc: Separate buyer and seller flows, vendor dashboards, order management, and commission rules that match how you run the marketplace.

benefits.title: Catalog that can rank
benefits.desc: Category structure, indexable pages, and structured data for catalog SEO, paired with search and ranking to increase conversion.

scope.title: What your build includes
bullets: Commission rules by vendor and category
Stripe Connect split payments and payouts
Vendor dashboard for orders and payouts
Catalog SEO pages and structured data

useCases.title: Niche marketplace
useCases.desc: You need deep filtering, attributes, and category SEO to win long-tail searches and convert high-intent buyers.

useCases.title: Local vendor network
useCases.desc: You want seller dashboards, automated split payouts, and commission reporting without manual back-office work.

useCases.title: B2B marketplace
useCases.desc: You need role-based access, company accounts, pricing rules, and workflows that fit procurement and repeat ordering.

useCases.title: Large catalog, search-led
useCases.desc: You need fast search, relevance tuning, synonyms, and ranking controls so buyers find products in seconds.

useCases.title: Higher-risk categories
useCases.desc: You need layered anti-fraud, review queues, and payout controls to reduce chargebacks and protect marketplace trust.

options.name: Stripe Connect
options.note: Split payments, payouts, and seller onboarding aligned to your commission model.

options.name: OpenSearch
options.note: Scalable search and ranking with filters, facets, and relevance tuning for large catalogs.

options.name: Algolia
options.note: Instant search experience with analytics and hands-on relevance controls for merchandising.

options.name: Sift
options.note: Anti-fraud signals and decisioning to reduce chargebacks and account abuse.

options.name: Twilio
options.note: Notifications and verification to support chat, alerts, and safer account flows.

steps.title: Quick discovery
steps.desc: You share your vendor model, commission rules, and the buyer journey you want to support.

steps.title: Scope and estimate
steps.desc: You receive modules, deliverables, timeline, and dependencies with clear acceptance criteria.

steps.title: Build and launch plan
steps.desc: You validate split payments, search, reviews, anti-fraud, and catalog SEO before going live.

faq.q: What drives marketplace development cost the most?
faq.a: The biggest drivers are multi-vendor workflows, Stripe Connect onboarding and payouts, search and ranking needs, and the depth of catalog SEO and moderation.

faq.q: Can you support Stripe Connect split payments end to end?
faq.a: Yes. The scope can cover seller onboarding, KYC requirements, split logic, payout schedules, refunds, disputes, and reconciliation reporting.

faq.q: How do commissions work for multiple vendors?
faq.a: You can set commissions by vendor, category, or rule. The platform calculates the take rate per order and applies it through the payout flow with reports for you and sellers.

faq.q: Do you include search, ranking, and filters?
faq.a: Yes. You get search with filters and sorting. For large catalogs, we can add relevance tuning, synonyms, and ranking controls for better findability.

faq.q: Are ratings, reviews, and buyer-seller chat included?
faq.a: Yes. The build can include reviews for products and sellers, moderation tools, and buyer-seller chat with message history and notifications.

faq.q: How long does it take to launch a marketplace MVP?
faq.a: It depends on your scope and integrations. After discovery, you get a staged timeline, usually starting with an MVP and expanding features like advanced search or anti-fraud.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to scope your marketplace with confidence?
ctaFinal.desc: Tell us your vendor model and goals, and get a clear estimate for a multi-vendor marketplace with split payments, search, reviews, chat, and catalog SEO.
